reasoning: Microsoft (MSFT) is currently trading at roughly $472 as of November 21, 2025. The stock peaked around $542 in late October before pulling back 7-8% into mid-November. In order to hit $668 by the end of November, MSFT, an enormous mega-cap company, would have to gain an unprecedented 41.5% in just around five trading days. Furthermore, there have been no extreme flash spikes making this a reality earlier in the month. Therefore, the probability of reaching this target price in November 2025 is vanishingly small.
